input_schema.description: A cat picture to evaluate for frame dominance.
A cat picture to evaluate for proportional occupation of the frame.
A cat picture to evaluate for positional prominence within the frame.
A cat picture to evaluate for scene clarity and background cooperativeness.

description: Evaluates the frame dominance of a single cat picture by scoring how much the cat commands the image. Assesses three dimensions — proportional occupation of the frame, positional prominence relative to focal lines, and scene clarity — producing a score from 0 to 1 that answers: is this picture actually about the cat?
